text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why? I'm not holding myself back by caring about
what other people think anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm running just for me, and... and it blows!
choice_data_list: But you'll keep on running, right?
But you'll keep on running, right?
It's all up to you now.
It's all up to you now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm running just for me, and... and it blows!
choice_data_list: But you'll keep on running, right?
But you'll keep on running, right?
It's all up to you now.
It's all up to you now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Of course. I already made my decision.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how many times I lose. No matter how
lame I look, I'll keep at it until I win!
choice_data_list: It's that determination that's always with you.
It's that determination that's always with you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know it. I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Because I want to keep running. That's all there is
to it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
So, do you want to give up because you're not
having fun?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No way! You already know that!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Losing sucks. It's frustrating, but that's how racing
works.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And I chose to race, so I'm not giving up!
choice_data_list: Then there's only one thing to do.
Then there's only one thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's have a review session. I want to go
through every race I couldn't win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be so cringe watching myself, but I
need to do more than just run!
